.file-embed.background: rgb(54, 57, 63) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(32, 34, 37) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(47, 49, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(47, 49, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(47, 49, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(47, 49, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(32, 34, 37) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(32, 34, 37) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(47, 49, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(32, 34, 37) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(54, 57, 63) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(255, 255, 0, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(54, 57, 63) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(54, 57, 63) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgb(54, 57, 63) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

th.background: rgb(47, 49, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(54, 57, 63) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
